title: User Preference or Default to have Boards within a Workspace to be Collapsed.
excerpt:
We would like by default or user preference for all Boards within a Workspace to be collapsed in Monday.com.

posts.author: mhansen (Michelle Hansen)
posts.cookedHtml:
We would like by default or user preference for all Boards within a Workspace to be collapsed in Monday.com.
We have a lot of boards within our workspaces, and by having these collapsed when opening Monday.com, this will help with having to collapse each time we open Monday.com.
